◎简　　介  

　　The magnificent Pihla Viitala is seen as a novel private detective, which starts with intense interaction with Antti Luusuaniemi's Real Estate Broker. The relationship is supposed to be just physical, but as the sixth time approaches, the stakes are beginning to grow and love is threatening to turn into love. Shadows quickly appear in paradise.
